name: Malzahar

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Void Shift
passive.description_source: Innate: Periodically,  Malzahar gains Void Shift until he takes non- minion damage or negates a  crowd control effect, to which it then lingers for a brief time before expiring.

effects.description: Innate: Periodically, Malzahar gains Void Shift until he takes non- minion damage or negates a crowd control effect, to which it then lingers for 0.25 seconds before expiring. Void Shift: Malzahar gains crowd control immunity and 90% damage reduction.
Void Shift's cooldown refreshes whenever Malzahar takes non- minion damage or is affected by a crowd control effect, and resets upon respawning.

passive.description: Innate: Periodically, Malzahar gains Void Shift until he takes non- minion damage or negates a crowd control effect, to which it then lingers for 0.25 seconds before expiring. Void Shift: Malzahar gains crowd control immunity and 90% damage reduction.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Void Shift will not resist allied crowd control nor will it be deactivated by them.

basic_ability_1.name: Call of the Void
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Malzahar opens two portals to the void at the target location that last a brief time, which then deal magic damage to enemies between and briefly  silence them.

effects.context_notes: Active: Malzahar opens two portals to the void centered at the target location, granting sight of the area in between.
Active: Malzahar opens two portals to the void centered at the target location, granting sight of the area in between.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Malzahar opens two portals to the void centered at the target location, granting sight of the area in between. After 0.4 seconds, enemies between the portals are dealt magic damage and silenced for a duration.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Spell shield will prevent Call of the Void's refresh on Malefic Visions.

basic_ability_2.name: Void Swarm
basic_ability_2.description_source: Passive:  Malzahar generates a stack of Zz'Rot Swarm when he casts another  ability, up to a maximum.

effects.description: Passive: Malzahar generates a stack of Zz'Rot Swarm when he casts another ability, up to a maximum of 2.

effects.context_notes: Active: Malzahar consumes all Zz'Rot Swarm stacks and, after a 0.
Voidlings deal magic damage with their attacks, reduced by 50% against epic monsters and increased by 200% to enemy minions infected by Malefic Visions.
Voidlings deal magic damage with their attacks, reduced by 50% against epic monsters and increased by 200% to enemy minions infected by Malefic Visions.

effects.description: See Pets for more details about Voidlings.

basic_ability_2.description: Passive: Malzahar generates a stack of Zz'Rot Swarm when he casts another ability, up to a maximum of 2.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Malzahar loses all stacks upon death.

basic_ability_3.name: Malefic Visions
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Malzahar infects the target enemy's mind, continually dealing magic damage over a few seconds, which refreshes upon damaging them with  Call of the Void or  Nether Grasp.

effects.context_notes: Active: Malzahar infects the target enemy's mind, dealing magic damage every 0.
Active: Malzahar infects the target enemy's mind, dealing magic damage every 0.

effects.description: If the target dies while infected, they spread Malefic Visions onto the closest nearby enemy and Malzahar restores 2% of his maximum mana.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Malzahar infects the target enemy's mind, dealing magic damage every 0.25 seconds over 4 seconds, which refreshes upon damaging them with Call of the Void or Nether Grasp. Malefic Visions executes minions if they would be damaged below 10 : 30 (based on level) health.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Malefic Vision's cast is special cased to not be cancelled if the target becomes untargetable, dies, or is too far away or no longer in sight during the cast time.

ultimate.name: Nether Grasp

effects.context_notes: Active: Malzahar tethers to the target enemy champion, knocking them down.
Active: Malzahar tethers to the target enemy champion, knocking them down.

effects.description: Malzahar will continue to channel as long as the tether is not broken, even if the suppression is removed.

effects.context_notes: Additionally, a Null Zone is opened beneath the target's location at the time of cast that lasts 5 seconds, dealing magic damage every 0.
Additionally, a Null Zone is opened beneath the target's location at the time of cast that lasts 5 seconds, dealing magic damage every 0.

effects.description: Null Zone will persist even if the channel is interrupted.

ultimate.description: Active: Malzahar tethers to the target enemy champion, knocking them down. He then channels for up to 2.5 seconds, suppressing and revealing the target and dealing them magic damage every 0.25 seconds, revealing himself in the process.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Applies persistent damage for the tether and persistent area damage to enemies within the Null Zone.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
